platformInstructions.title: Mrs Marina Atef Platform Instructions
platformInstructions.subtitle: Please read carefully before proceeding
instructions: The platform is a website available on Google Chrome or Firefox browsers only.
The platform must be opened from a mobile phone, computer, or laptop. The use of school tablets is strictly prohibited as they are not qualified to use the platform, even if they are hacked.
After subscription, course refund or exchange will not be available. Please make sure of the course you want to subscribe to. 🚫
The account is for your personal use only and sharing it with friends is not allowed. If account sharing is discovered, it will be permanently closed.
You must use strong and stable internet, preferably a stable Wi-Fi network.
When registering on the platform, you must ensure the accuracy of your data to ensure proper periodic follow-up.
The name must be written in Arabic as it appears on the ID card when registering.
Don't forget to verify your phone number and password and write this information in a safe place so you don't forget it.
You can watch one video on the platform a maximum of five times during one academic year.
A view is counted when exceeding 30% of the video duration.
You must follow the platform regularly and solve assignments and tests because there are weekly reports sent to the parent about your activity on the platform.
The platform will be available to you until the first semester exams only.
platformInstructions.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
